data.name: Fast Food Girlfriend
data.detailed_description:
Summary

Fast Food Girlfriend is an adult management sim that blends fast-paced cooking, cheeky comedy, and steamy romance in a fast food restaurant fighting for survival. As the new manager of a struggling fast food restaurant under the franchise, McWynn's, you’ll flip burgers, fend off loan sharks, gangsters, and food inspectors while igniting sparks with your childhood friend and coworker, Mila, in a romcom plot. With a vibrant cast, engaging mini-games, and uncensored intimate moments, this is one shift you’ll never forget.

The Plot

Your father’s gambling and drug addiction have obliterated the family fortune, leaving only a single asset: a rundown McWynn’s fast food restaurant, a piece of your childhood you’re determined to save. Tasked with turning it around, you team up with Mila, your loyal coworker and childhood friend, to earn a top business rating and prove to your father you can keep the franchise alive. Fail, and he’ll sell it to the highest bidder. Alongside enthusiastic young Janelle and dry-witted Ricardo, you’ll cook, serve, and strategize to keep your McWynn’s doors open. Every order, every decision, and every heated moment with Mila brings you closer to glory—or ruin.

Gameplay

Fast Food Girlfriend is a mix of management sim and adult romance. Master the art of fast food as you take orders, grill burgers, and sling fries to satisfy hungry customers. The cooking mechanics are simple but require you to keep track of not producing waste, which will lower your profits and business rating. 

But it’s not all burgers and shakes. The game throws curveballs with mini-games that test your wit and grit. Defend your restaurant from loan sharks shaking you down for your father’s debts, using quick-time events to outsmart them with comedic flair. Ward off food inspectors with charm and knowledge, face off against corporate suits trying to shut you down, and even fist fight against gangsters crashing your shift.

Romance

At the heart of McWynn’s is Mila, your childhood friend and coworker whose bond with you deepens through the grind of restaurant life. Her laidback and playful teasing light up the screen, and as you work side by side, the tension builds into uncensored, intimate scenes set against the backdrop of the restaurant after hours. The scenes are animated with audio and reward your progress. Mila’s evolving relationship with you is woven into the narrative, blending heartfelt connection with steamy encounters that reflect your shared struggle and growing love.

data.short_description: Fast Food Girlfriend is an adult management sim that blends fast-paced cooking, cheeky comedy, and steamy romance in a fast food restaurant fighting for survival.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft Windows® 8.1/10 (64bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-4340 or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible OpenGL / VRAM 1GB or better
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
